description_long: This apple has a round, slightly irregular shape with a short, brown stem protruding from the top. Its skin displays a mottled mix of green, yellow, and reddish-orange hues, with some areas showing significant browning and dark blemishes. One side of the apple is heavily bruised and discolored, with a patch of dark, rough, and sunken spots indicating rot or decay. The surface is semi-glossy, with a natural waxy sheen typical of apples, but the damaged areas appear duller and rougher. The apple's overall appearance suggests it has been handled or left out for some time, leading to visible imperfections. No stickers or labels are present, and the apple is shown isolated on a plain white background.
description: A round apple with green, yellow, and reddish skin, featuring visible bruises and rot on one side.
description_view_0: Green apple with a small brown bruise and reddish blush near the top.
description_view_1: Mostly green and yellow apple with a faint bruise and more orange tint.
description_view_2: Large, dark, rough patch of rot and bruising dominates one side.
description_view_3: Rotten, sunken area with dark streaks visible, plus a small bruise on the opposite side.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large rotten patch, bruises, and dark blemishes
